name: Algorithmic Art
author: Anthropic
description: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. Use when users request creating art using code, generative art, flow fields, or particle systems.

name: Brand Guidelines
author: Anthropic
description: Apply Anthropic official brand colors and typography to artifacts that benefit from a consistent look-and-feel. Use when brand colors, style guidelines, or visual formatting apply.

name: Canvas Design
author: Anthropic
description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. Use when users ask to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece.

name: Document
author: Finch Team
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents. Use for any .docx task: reports, memos, letters, templates, tracked changes, or converting content into a polished Word document.

name: Finch Mini Tool Creator
author: Finch Team
description: Guide for developing, debugging, and testing Finch mini tools. Use when creating a new tool, adding custom agent tools or composer action buttons, or debugging an existing tool.

name: Find Skills
author: Vercel Labs
description: This skill helps you discover and install skills from the open agent skills ecosystem.

name: Internal Comms
author: Anthropic
description: A set of resources for writing internal communications, including 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQ responses, status reports, leadership updates, project updates, and incident reports.

name: PDF
author: Finch Team
description: Work with PDF files: read, extract text/tables, merge, split, rotate pages, add watermarks, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR scanned PDFs.

name: Presentation
author: Finch Team
description: Work with PowerPoint files: create slide decks, pitch decks, and presentations; read, edit, combine, or split .pptx files; work with templates, layouts, and speaker notes.

name: Skill Creator
author: Finch Team
description: Create, edit, evaluate, and optimize Finch skills. Includes built-in evals, variance analysis, and tools to benchmark and improve skill trigger accuracy.

name: Spreadsheet
author: Finch Team
description: Work with spreadsheet files (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv): read, edit, add columns, compute formulas, format, chart, clean messy data, or create new spreadsheets from scratch.
